message:
bd-1h06: add 49 unit tests for node:child_process shim

Tests cover module exports, spawn() validation (empty command, non-array
args, option restrictions, stdio modes), kill() semantics (flag, return
value, close event, idempotency), process kill bridge (EINVAL/ESRCH error
codes, negative pid), emitter chaining (on/off/once/removeListener),
execSync/execFileSync/spawnSync validation, exec/execFile callback
acceptance, fork() rejection, and global state isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
